chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-684 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case. For hearing of main case 27-02-2025 Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Mansoor Ahmed, Deputy Prosecutor General ******** Learned counsel for the applicant submits that he would be satisfied if he may be allowed to exhaust proper remedy provided by the law except FIR by filing direct complaint and withdraw the instant application. Order accordingly. The instant application is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Naveed
